## Description
Briefly describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request (what does it fix/add/change?).

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New component or feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, Code of Conduct, etc.)

## Checklist
Before submitting, please make sure you have completed the following:
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
- [ ] I ran `./minify.sh` and it completed successfully (compiled bundles are updated).
- [ ] My code has **zero external dependencies** and is written in pure CSS/vanilla JS.
- [ ] I updated the documentation/README if my changes introduce new components or properties.
